_readme: SINGLE SOURCE OF TRUTH for every contact detail in ReviewHub. No email, phone, address, officer name, or social/platform handle may exist as a literal anywhere else in this repo — not in the footer, not in a page, not in the privacy policy, not in a form fallback. src/lib/contact.js is the ONLY file that reads this. Everything else imports from there.
_owner: TODO — name + role of the person who approves changes to this file

brand.tagline: TODO — one line, must survive the sentence 'we don't pay for reviews'
brand.legalEntity: TODO — registered company name Pvt. Ltd.
brand._note: website domain MUST match the domain of emails.support / emails.sales. Mismatched domains are the #1 rejection reason on the Google Business Profile API access request.

support._note: Business & Enterprise entitlement only. Do not render on pages visible to Starter/Growth.

registered.full: TODO — single-line rendering for footer, invoice, and GBP listing

grievanceOfficer.name: TODO
grievanceOfficer._note: MANDATORY. Name, email and address must be published on the site — IT Rules 2021 and Consumer Protection (E-Commerce) Rules 2020. Site cannot launch in India without this.

dataProtectionOfficer.name: TODO
dataProtectionOfficer._note: Required only if notified as a Significant Data Fiduciary under the DPDP Act 2023.

platforms._readme: ReviewHub's OWN presence on each platform — where customers find and review US. This is contact data: 'where to find us'. It is NOT the platform registry (which platforms the product supports, API endpoints, capabilities, scopes) — that belongs in a separate platforms.json and must never live here. contact.json is imported by the footer and the privacy policy; API config has no business in that blast radius.

googleBusinessProfile.label: Google Business Profile
googleBusinessProfile._note: ★ CRITICAL PATH. The GBP API access request requires a verified profile that is 60+ days old. Newer listings are auto-rejected on age. This field is the clock — set verifiedOn the day it verifies, and do not submit the API request before verifiedOn + 60 days. Nothing can compress this.

ambitionbox.label: AmbitionBox
ambitionbox._note: Employer profile. Monitoring only — we never solicit or incentivise employee reviews.

support._note: SLA values are quoted publicly on /pricing and become contractual the moment someone pays. plan.json references these by key — it must never copy the numbers. Changing one is a major version bump.
